review.description: Reviews CICT code for quality, security, and best practices

planner.description: Plans multi-step features and changes across the CICT monorepo

debug.description: Debug issues across the CICT full stack (backend, web, mobile)

tester.description: Writes and runs tests for the CICT monorepo

database.description: Handles MongoDB schema, indexes, and query optimization for CICT

devops.description: Manages Render, Vercel, Docker, CI/CD for CICT

test.template:
Run the full test suite across all CICT apps. First build contracts, then run:
- pnpm run backend:test
- pnpm run web:test
- pnpm run mobile:test
Report any failures and suggest fixes.
test.description: Run full test suite across all apps

lint.template:
Run lint across all CICT apps:
- pnpm run backend:lint
- pnpm run web:lint
- pnpm run mobile:lint
Fix any lint errors found.

typecheck.template:
Run typecheck across all CICT apps:
- pnpm run backend:typecheck
- pnpm run web:typecheck
- pnpm run mobile:typecheck
Fix any type errors found.

build.template:
Run the full CICT build pipeline. First build contracts, then build backend and web:
pnpm run build

review.template:
Review the recent changes for quality, security, and best practices.

Recent git diff:
!`git diff --stat HEAD~1`

Check for:
1. Security issues (input validation, auth, XSS, etc.)
2. Backward compatibility
3. Error handling patterns
4. Type safety
5. Test coverage

backend.template:
Work on the CICT backend (apps/backend/). Available commands:
- pnpm run backend:dev — start dev
- pnpm run backend:lint — lint
- pnpm run backend:typecheck — typecheck
- pnpm run backend:test — run tests
- pnpm run backend:seed — seed database
- pnpm run backend:mongo:up — start MongoDB
- pnpm run backend:mongo:down — stop MongoDB

web.template:
Work on the CICT web frontend (apps/web/). Available commands:
- pnpm run web:dev — start dev
- pnpm run web:lint — lint
- pnpm run web:typecheck — typecheck
- pnpm run web:test — run tests
- pnpm run web:build — build

mobile.template:
Work on the CICT mobile app (apps/mobile/). Available commands:
- pnpm run mobile:dev — start dev
- pnpm run mobile:lint — lint
- pnpm run mobile:typecheck — typecheck
- pnpm run mobile:test — run tests
- pnpm run mobile:android — run on Android
- pnpm run mobile:ios — run on iOS

plan.template:
Create a detailed implementation plan for: $ARGUMENTS

Analyze the requirements and produce:
1. Files that need to be created or modified
2. Data model changes (MongoDB schemas, API contracts)
3. Backend changes (routes, controllers, middleware)
4. Frontend changes (pages, components, hooks)
5. Mobile changes (if applicable)
6. Test requirements
7. Migration steps
8. Risks and considerations
